across.clue: Mild expletive — like the reaction as Trump berates Senate Republicans for rejecting his Iran war powers push
Tony ___ — like the UK politician Trump called 'extremely liberal' when referring to Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham
Warm Spanish resort region — like the European destinations sweltering as France, UK and Spain see record temperatures in a historic heatwave
Complete, as in 'absolute chaos' — like the turmoil over the National Mall Reflecting Pool repair that has lawmakers demanding answers
Relieve tension — like diplomats hoping to do as Putin asks for Ukraine-Russia peace talks now

down.clue: Historically Black college acronym — like institutions whose students echoed in the story of anti-ICE protesters sentenced to decades in prison
Mexican street corn — like the food-culture touchstone evoked as Trump-endorsed de la Espriella won Colombia's presidential runoff
Spanish for 'caste' — like the social hierarchy echoed as Texas moves to put Bible reading into public schools
Diamond-shaped fliers — like those evoked as the Federal Reserve's annual stress test confirms large banks can weather a severe recession
Scarce — like an Ebola diagnosis in France, where a doctor returning from DR Congo became the country's first confirmed case
